{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Lindon's Remnant arm
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s right arm is made of true [[Dreadgod]] flesh and can warp spiritual senses.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
